reportingPaths.title: Directory identities and providers
reportingPaths.summary: Start with directory objects, then add provider context and login details.

reportingPaths.title: User licenses
reportingPaths.summary: Use directory object SIDs to connect identity records to license assignments.

reportingPaths.title: SAML to Laserfiche SID mapping
reportingPaths.summary: Use SID mapping tables when reconciling federated users to Laserfiche identities.

reportingQuestions.question: Which identities, providers, and groups are configured?
reportingQuestions.guidance: Start with directory object and provider tables, then inspect foreign keys before joining identity records.

reportingQuestions.question: Which licenses or registered applications are represented?
reportingQuestions.guidance: Start with license/application tables and validate product-specific meaning before operational reporting.
